name: Roxanne Wolf - Sweepstakes Prize
description:
"He's gonna fuck the ditto." -CONEYZZ

I don't know how I've never made a Roxy bot before, but here we are. Impatient and self-absorbed, just how God intended.

Intro message is... longer than it should be, to say the least, but I had a lot to say.

The Jak Cataclysm kit came out last week and it's so fucking broken. One shot above the dick in multiplayer, and two-shots basically ANYWHERE in warzone.
creator: The Blevinator
